items.value:
Fridge News Update

The Fridge continues broadcasting 24/7 with student-led shows across its FM network in Canterbury and surrounding regions. Students are currently producing live segments during school days, with increased participation from new on-air trainees this term.

Bible Teaching Feature Growing

The 7am and 7pm Bible teaching slots have seen increased listener engagement, with more schools and families tuning in across Christchurch, Ashburton, and Wanaka frequencies.

Student Broadcasting Training

New student presenters have joined the station this term, learning live broadcasting skills, music selection, and responsible on-air communication guided by Philippians 4:8 principles.

Community Engagement Expands

The Fridge mobile studio has begun visiting additional schools in Canterbury, giving students the opportunity to broadcast live and record content for upcoming shows.

Listener Interaction Increasing

More shout-outs and song requests are being submitted through the website, with several student recordings recently featured on-air during daytime programming.
